sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65858" key="melanqe/ā" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μελαν-θέᾱ</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n65858.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">μελάνων ὅρασις</ref></xr>, opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λευκοθέα</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristo Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.86</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
